sessions.session_title: Go Price Tracker Restructure + Oracle Cloud Deployment Research
key_achievements: Restructured project: app/ → root main.go + internal/ package
Added real-time progress bar with mutex-protected progress tracking
Implemented relative timestamps + JS local timezone conversion
Built mobile-responsive CSS (hides columns on small screens)
Researched Oracle Cloud Free Tier options (documented in deployment-discovery.md)
Fixed last pass timestamp to show local timezone

sessions.session_title: Oracle VM Online + Deployment Runbook + Recovered Missing internal/ Package
key_achievements: Recovered internal/ Go package — gitignored as 'build artifact', never pushed; GitHub repo did not compile
Fixed VM SSH hang: manual VCN was missing 0.0.0.0/0 → Internet Gateway route
Confirmed A1.Flex ARM (aarch64) Oracle Linux 9 VM; Apple Silicon images run natively
Wrote DEPLOYMENT.md: podman quadlet + cloudflared tunnel + Cloudflare Access runbook (no NGINX needed)
Set up VM packages (EPEL, zellij binary) + dnf-automatic and Ksplice patching
Chose OCIR as registry (effectively free on PAYG); CI pipeline design pending
Earlier same conversation: verified all 20 scraper sources, Python v1 checkpoint, Go v2

metadata.description: PC component price tracker with Go backend, HTMX frontend, Oracle Cloud deployment
